metadata.purpose: Reference sentences used as semantic anchors for sentence-level value scoring
design_principles: Each sentence anchors clearly to one value's motivational goal
Mix of Philippine and general news contexts to avoid corpus overfit
Schwartz values are positive expressions (no vice poles, unlike MFT)
Topical variety within each value to broaden the centroid
metadata.exclusion_rationale: Hedonism (pleasure, sensuous gratification for oneself) is rarely the surface motivation of news content; Stimulation is the closest functional analogue. Researchers can add Hedonism by appending a new key to this file and rerunning the pipeline.
metadata.active_size_note: Set by 06_exemplar_stability_test.py. Pipeline samples this many exemplars per value with random_state=42 at runtime.

Security.definition: Safety, harmony, and stability of society, of relationships, and of self.
Security.motivational_goal: Avoid threats; preserve social and personal safety.
exemplars: The coast guard rescued thirty fishermen stranded by the typhoon off the coast of Aurora.
Authorities increased police visibility in the area after a string of robberies near the terminal.
The military reinforced its positions along the border to deter incursions from armed groups.
Disaster officials evacuated coastal communities ahead of the approaching super typhoon.
The bomb squad safely detonated the improvised device found near the public market.
Police arrested three suspects in the kidnapping of a businessman in Quezon City.
The fire department conducted drills to prepare residents for high-rise emergencies.
Rescue teams pulled survivors from the rubble of the collapsed building.

Soldiers patrolled the area where a recent ambush left two officers wounded.
The agency issued a tsunami warning after the offshore earthquake shook the region.
Police set up checkpoints along the highway following reports of an armed robbery.

Hospitals went on red alert as casualties from the explosion arrived at emergency rooms.

Residents praised the rescue workers who saved them from the rising floodwaters.

The interior department coordinated relief efforts in towns ravaged by the storm.

Power.definition: Social status and prestige, control or dominance over people and resources.
Power.motivational_goal: Attain or preserve a dominant position within the broader social system.

The senate confirmed the new cabinet appointee after a contentious hearing.
The administration consolidated control over key agencies after the reshuffling.
The party announced its slate for next year's midterm elections at a grand convention.

Achievement.motivational_goal: Achieve recognition and reward through visible accomplishment.

Benevolence.definition: Preserving and enhancing the welfare of those with whom one is in frequent personal contact.
Benevolence.motivational_goal: Care for and support the well-being of close others — family, friends, community.

Universalism.definition: Understanding, appreciation, tolerance, and protection for the welfare of all people and for nature.
Universalism.motivational_goal: Advance the well-being of all people and of the natural environment.

Stimulation.definition: Excitement, novelty, and challenge in life.
Stimulation.motivational_goal: Seek variety, exciting experiences, and daring new pursuits.

Tradition.definition: Respect, commitment, and acceptance of the customs and ideas that one's culture or religion provides.
Tradition.motivational_goal: Preserve cultural and religious heritage; defer to accepted ways.
exemplars: Devotees walked barefoot through the streets in the centuries-old Black Nazarene procession.
Families gathered around the table for the traditional Noche Buena Christmas Eve feast.
The town celebrated its patron saint's feast day with a grand fiesta and Mass.
Elders led the community in the customary harvest dance passed down through generations.

Self-Direction.definition: Independent thought and action — choosing, creating, exploring.
Self-Direction.motivational_goal: Think independently, create new ideas, and act with autonomy.
exemplars: The young scientist developed a low-cost device to detect waterborne diseases in remote villages.
The startup founder built her first prototype in her garage before launching the company.
The independent filmmaker turned down studio funding to maintain creative control over her work.
The researcher published her findings after years of independent investigation into the mystery.
The painter explored bold new techniques never before tried in Philippine contemporary art.
The novelist wrote her debut book over weekends while working full-time as a teacher.
The engineering students designed an affordable prosthetic limb using local materials.
The journalist pursued the story for years despite repeated warnings from powerful interests.
The teenager taught herself coding online and launched her first mobile app at sixteen.
The musician composed her album entirely on her own, playing every instrument.
The entrepreneur left a stable job to start his own farm-to-table restaurant.
The biologist trekked into uncharted forest to document a previously unknown species.
The architect designed homes from sustainable materials that defied conventional construction.
The young researcher questioned the prevailing theory and proposed her own framework.

Conformity.definition: Restraint of actions, inclinations, and impulses likely to upset or harm others and violate social expectations or norms.
Conformity.motivational_goal: Comply with rules, expectations, and social norms; show self-discipline and politeness.
exemplars: Motorists complied with the new traffic regulations issued by the land transportation office.
Students wore the prescribed school uniform in accordance with the institution's dress code.
Drivers were required to renew their licenses by the deadline set by the agency.
Businesses adjusted operations to comply with the new health and safety ordinance.
The ordinance required all residents to keep their pets leashed in public areas.
Vehicles were directed to follow the rerouting plan during the road closure.

Workers were reminded to follow the company's strict policies on attendance.
